additions.entry: IPlugin interface, that describes the plugin structure
PluginContext record, that communicates registered instructions between loader and plugin
IInstructionRegistry interface, that describes the layout of instruction registry implementations
PluginLoader class, that can load (valid) plugins
ConcreteInstructionRegistry, that is a global container of all possible instruction handlers registered at runtime

refactorings.entry: CoreConfig to conform to new global instruction registry structure
CoreConfigParser to conform to new global instruction registry structure
InstructionParser to conform to new global instruction registry structure

additions.entry: PluginConfig, that describes plugin config file structure
PluginConfigParser, XML parser that parses file into instances of PluginConfig
RegistermaschinePlugin class, that describes the functionality of this default plugin. And enforces to use as plugin structure.
plugin.xml, that is the configuration of this default instruction set plugin.

refactorings.entry: package structure of this new plugin
